inputs.request: Approve changing the verified owner-only Oracle Web deployment to public access, or provide the approved public Website route that will consume the handoff.

Executed rights or written approval for at least three independent YNX-capable market-data sources, including redistribution, benchmark/valuation, retention, regions, quotas, costs, and decommission terms.
Secure signer or HSM paths and public reporter identities for each approved provider. Do not transmit private keys in chat or commit them.
Approved deployment account, public API hostname, DNS/TLS control, and ingress/monitoring destination.
Wallet/Auth/Gateway, Explorer, Monitor, Exchange, DEX, Quant, Stablecoin, and Finance owners to review the versioned handoff and return acceptance evidence.
Approved Support, Privacy, Security, Status, retention/deletion, refund/dispute, and service-shutdown URLs and owners.
